query:
UPDATE users SET 
  plan = 'pro', 
  tier = 'pro', 
  subscriptionStatus = 'ACTIVE',
  role = 'admin',
  credits = 1000,
  analysisCount = 0
WHERE id = 1;

SELECT id, name, email, role, plan, tier, subscriptionStatus, credits FROM users WHERE id = 1;
